title: tabernaemontana officinalis
intro: Tabernaemontana officinalis, also known as the Yellow Formosa or Yellow Formosan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana officinalis include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving symptoms of insomnia, and easing muscle spasms, as well as its potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. Tabernaemontana officinalis can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to topical creams for external use.
